untranslatable_reason: Symmetrical triangle pattern detection requires geometric shape analysis (convergence of highs/lows over multiple bars) which cannot be expressed with point-in-time indicators. The doji detection is approximated via body_pct < 0.05 (small body), but true triangle formation requires historical pattern recognition not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Approximated doji candlestick as body_pct < 0.05 (very small body as percentage of range). Approximated bullish gap-up opening as open > prev_close. Exit on breakdown below prior low. The core symmetrical triangle pattern itself cannot be fully captured without multi-bar geometric analysis capabilities. Author provided no exit conditions so a reversal-based exit was inferred.
